text.title: Azure DevOps Boards Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Azure DevOps Boards methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-process-template
step.action: Pick Basic / Agile / Scrum / CMMI before any work items exist.

step.name: define-area-iteration
step.action: Define area paths by ownership; iteration paths by time; never mix.

step.name: configure-boards
step.action: Per team: map each column to exactly one state; add swimlanes only for classification.
step.decision-gate: If any column maps to multiple states, halt.

step.name: write-shared-queries
step.action: Store queries under /Shared Queries/v<n>/<slug>; freeze edits to shared queries.

step.name: lock-permissions
step.action: Project Administrators <=3; Contributors for active devs; Stakeholders for outside reviewers.
